# X attribute with parallel prereqs: exclusive recipe waits for others to finish.
# This exercises the reserveExclusiveSubproc wait/steal loop.
# The "delay" prerequisite forces excl to start after a/b acquire their slots.
mk -p 2 -f mkfile
stdout 'exclusive done'
stdout 'a done'
stdout 'b done'

-- mkfile --
all:V: a b excl
a:V:
	sleep 0.1 && echo a done
b:V:
	sleep 0.1 && echo b done
delay:V:
	sleep 0.02
excl:VX: delay
	echo exclusive done
